scene.message: {nl}
{nl}
Himeno: Um...{nl} Please be careful...{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: Wait,{nl} {ctl0f:1}'s leaving too?{waitkey}{ret}
You're going to take{nl} down SEBEC, aren't you?{ctl0e:26}{ret}
Ayase: That's crazy,{nl} stop it!{waitkey}{ret}
Himeno: Ah...{wait_fr:60} Maki{wait_fr:60} -chan...?{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: Eh?{wait_fr:60} ...Could{nl} that be... So...{wait_fr:60}noda?{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: {ctl0f:1}!{nl} What?! Why is Sonoda here?{waitkey}{ret}
